findings.message: Container 'admin-container' sets capabilities (add: SYS_ADMIN). Dangerous capabilities detected: SYS_ADMIN. This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'network-container' sets capabilities (add: NET_ADMIN, NET_RAW). Dangerous capabilities detected: NET_ADMIN. This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'ptrace-container' sets capabilities (add: SYS_PTRACE). Dangerous capabilities detected: SYS_PTRACE. This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'restricted-container' sets capabilities (drop: ALL). This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'privileged-network' sets capabilities (add: NET_BIND_SERVICE; drop: MKNOD). This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'module-loader' sets capabilities (add: SYS_MODULE). Dangerous capabilities detected: SYS_MODULE. This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'file-accessor' sets capabilities (add: DAC_OVERRIDE). Dangerous capabilities detected: DAC_OVERRIDE. This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'uid-changer' sets capabilities (add: SETUID, SETGID). Dangerous capabilities detected: SETUID, SETGID. This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.

Container 'chown-container' sets capabilities (add: CHOWN). This is security-sensitive and can lead to privilege escalation and container escapes. Review carefully to ensure only necessary capabilities are granted.
